---
title: "Statistics 422 (Survey Sampling Methods)"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: readable
---

Course material for Stat 422 (Survey Sampling Methods) for the Fall semester of 2022 at the University of Idaho.

***

<center>

![https://xkcd.com/2443](https://imgs.xkcd.com/comics/immune_response.png)

I was reminded of this comic after getting the new COVID-19 bivalent booster vaccine recently.

</center>

***

If you are interested in seeing the [R Markdown](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) code I use to create this website and its contents, you can browse the [source files on GitHub](https://github.com/trobinj/stat422/tree/gh-pages). The source files have a .Rmd extension.
